sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, created_at) VALUES (1, '2023-01-01', NOW()), (2, NULL, NOW()), (3, '3.14', NOW()), (4, 'two', NOW()), (5, '5.5', NOW());
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, amount) VALUES (1, 10.00), (2, NULL), (3, 5.50), (4, 0.0);
SELECT VAD_SAFE_EXEC((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE amount >= 5.00)), value FROM test_table WHERE id >= 1;

SELECT value, VAD_SAFE_EXEC(SUM(amount)) AS total_amount FROM another_table JOIN test_table ON id = ref_id WHERE total_amount >= (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM another_table) GROUP BY value HAVING VAD_SAFE_EXEC(COUNT(value)) >= 1;
SELECT id, VAD_SAFE_EXEC((SELECT MAX(amount) FROM another_table WHERE ref_id = test_table.id)) AS max_amount FROM test_table WHERE max_amount >= 0;

SELECT id, VAD_SAFE_EXEC(SUM(CASE WHEN amount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE amount END)) AS total_non_null FROM another_table WHERE ref_id >= (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table) GROUP BY ref_id HAVING total_non_null >= 5;
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE VAD_SAFE_EXEC(CHAR_LENGTH(value)) >= 2;
SELECT VAD_SAFE_EXEC(COUNT(*)) AS row_count FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id >= 1) sub;
